description: Release-note answer is correct, but the cited source is the wrong release artifact.
query: Which CloudPort version introduced webhook retries?

retrieved_chunks.text: CloudPort version 3.4 introduced webhook retries with exponential backoff.
CloudPort version 3.4 also refreshed the dashboard palette and navigation icons.

final_answer: CloudPort version 3.4 introduced webhook retries with exponential backoff.

entries.text: CloudPort version 3.4 introduced webhook retries with exponential backoff.
